{{CargoRelic
|name=Oversized Meatball
|class_id=20432
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Pawson's Seven-jeweled Pagoda used to be a high-tech mystery. Using the high radiation field in the tower, he's turned countless foes into a collection of bio samples. Over an immeasurable time, the flesh has been torn from the unfortunate victims to form this humongous meatball!
|fame=31
|art=14
|fth=15
|civ=19
|tech=11
|ss1=Against Pawson, DMG +300%
|ss2=Against Pawson, DMG +400%
|ss3=Against Pawson, DMG +500%
|ss4=Against Pawson, DMG +500%
|ss7=Against Pawson, DMG +500%<br> (Awakened)
}}
